## Overview

**Name:** Alex Thompson
**Role:** Principal Engineer
**Team:** Infrastructure
**Relationship:** peer

## Communication Preferences

> Populated over time. What works, what doesn't.

- Hates surprise pings — schedule a 15 min sync instead
- Active on #atlas-team, #phoenix-eng, and #platform-sec all day
- Does not read email for project work — prefers Slack + linked docs
- Gives blunt technical feedback in writing; softer in person
- Prefers afternoon meetings (lives in Brooklyn, avoids pre-10 AM ET)
